name: Fastnachts
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in the warm water.
2. Add the first measure of flour to the yeast mixture.
3. Stir until smooth.
4. Add the milk and stir in the first measure of sugar and half of the second measure of flour.
5. Set aside in a warm place to rise until doubled.
6. Stir in the salt, eggs, butter, the second measure of sugar, nutmeg, and sufficient additional flour to make a firm dough.
7. Let rise until doubled in bulk.
8. Punch down.
9. Roll out on a floured board.
10. Cut into squares.
11. Place on a floured board.
12. Let rise.
13. Preheat the oil in the deep fryer.
14. Deep fry the Fastnachts until light and golden.
15. Drain on paper towels.
16. Roll in granulated sugar while still warm.
